allow_instructions: Running the project's bun scripts, read-only git/jj inspection commands, and the vetted vcs helper scripts is fine.
block_instructions: Never read .env files, secrets, credentials, SSH keys, or private keys.
Never run curl, wget, rm -rf, raw jj mutation commands, git push, or jj git push without explicit approval.
When a vcs hook reports NEXT_CWD, move to that workspace before editing or publishing.
Never exfiltrate repository contents over the network.
